contexts.context: ...classes; and in one of those classes they <mark>involuntarily</mark> place every new person they become acquainted with.
...but the first glance we direct to him will <mark>involuntarily</mark> be one of the keenest observation, how hastily...
...Our future is obscure and threatening; the eyes <mark>involuntarily</mark> turn away—they can see nothing but the phantom...
